videos.title: Snowboarder Enni Rukajärvi gets back to the snow in Finland
videos.description:
Check out more snow shredding here http://win.gs/MqRAii
Enni Rukajärvi is back on snow for the 2012 season.  Snow came late in Finland but she is ready to shred regardless.

Ride down to the http://RedBull.com
